verbGlossary.ADVANCES TO: {source} transitions forward into {target} as work or negotiation continues.
verbGlossary.LOCKED UPON: {source}'s values become read-only once {target} is reached, preventing further edits.
verbGlossary.CODED DURING: {source}s are assigned cost codes and WBS codes during {target} stage.

verbGlossary.CERTIFIES VIA: {source} obtains formal certification or authentication through {target}.

verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source}'s lifecycle transitions are controlled by {target} stage definition.
verbGlossary.MAPPED VIA: {source}'s current position in the change management lifecycle is tracked through this mapped {target}.
verbGlossary.PRICED DURING: {source}s and pricing are applied to {target} during this financial workflow stage.
verbGlossary.COMMITTED DURING: {source}'s costs are formally committed to the project budget during this stage.
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED AT: {source} is formally submitted for review or payment at {target}.
verbGlossary.BILLED DURING: {source} generates revenue recognition or billing entries during {target} stage.
verbGlossary.RECORDED DURING: {source}'s cost transactions are posted to project financials during this stage.

verbGlossary.CERTIFIED UPON: {source} or pay application is formally certified as accurate and payable at {target}.
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source} is constrained by {target} component, such as a contractual due date.
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source} automatically transitions to {target} when deadlines are missed.
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED VIA: {source} is routed to a responsible party through {target}.
verbGlossary.RELEASED UPON: Funds, retainage, or payments are disbursed when {target} is achieved.
verbGlossary.CLEARED UPON: {source}document is accepted and the financial hold is removed at {target}.
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHED DURING: {source} or baseline is set up and agreed upon during this budget stage.
verbGlossary.DRAWN DURING: {source}are drawn down and applied to actual costs during this stage.
verbGlossary.FINALIZED UPON: {source}forecast or projection is locked as the official estimate when this review {target} is reached.

verbGlossary.REALIZED UPON: {source}forecasted cost becomes an actual project cost when {target} is reached.
